---
name: Spike / Research
about: Investigate a problem or evaluate an approach
title: 'spike: '
labels: spike
assignees: ''
---

## Question

What question are we trying to answer?

## Context

What do we know so far? Why is this investigation needed?

## Approach

How will we investigate?

- [ ] Literature / docs review
- [ ] Prototype
- [ ] Benchmark
- [ ] Proof of concept

## Output

What does "done" look like?

- [ ] Recommendation documented
- [ ] Findings shared with team
- [ ] ADR written (if decision needed)

## Timebox

How long should this take?

- [ ] Hours
- [ ] 1–2 days
- [ ] 3–5 days
